issues.detail: The skill file lacks explicit usage instructions, making it less clear how to invoke the skill.
Examples do not cover error handling or edge cases, limiting completeness.

scenarios.name: Real-time YOLO object detection on webcam with mp4 output
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses cv2.dnn.readNetFromONNX with blobFromImage(1/255.0, (640,640), swapRB=True), VideoWriter with mp4v fourcc at 30 fps, and draws rectangles with cv2.putText overlays as in the skill; baseline reaches for ultralytics/torch instead of OpenCV's DNN module.

scenarios.name: Shape detection pipeline for scanned form regions
scenarios.rationale: Treatment follows the documented preprocessing order (gray -> GaussianBlur -> adaptiveThreshold -> morphologyEx OPEN/CLOSE -> findContours with RETR_EXTERNAL) and classifies shapes via approxPolyDP side count; baseline mixes Pillow and ad-hoc thresholding and skips morphology cleanup.
